text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Warm memories cradle me in a dream. Memories of childhood, of the
holidays...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After prepping the ingredients, Father bakes us a special French
holiday cake. It's so sweet and—

text_block_list.name: Young Flash
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Papa, it's amazing! How are your cakes always so good?!

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Well, that's because I follow the recipe. And not just any recipe—the perfect recipe, tested and refined time and time again.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: The ingredients, baking time, even the way I use this powdered sugar—everything is predetermined. I simply go through the correct motions.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Not a gram too much or too little. Precision is what makes my cakes taste good, and it's my source of pride as a patissier.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Do you understand, Flash? Our—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Where... am I?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, could you tell me what's happened? Why am I in the nurse's
office?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see... I must have been more fatigued than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But if it's nothing serious, I'll still be able to race tomorrow. Am I
correct to assume that?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I know. I won't be able to give my best performance like this. That's
what you want to say, I'm guessing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Still, I must race tomorrow, no matter what. I... won't get a second
chance.
choice_data_list: Why do you push yourself so hard?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When I left for Japan, I made a promise to my parents. I promised
that one year later, they'd see how I'd grown up properly on my own.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In return, I asked for just one day of their time. They've upheld their
end of the deal and found time in their busy schedules for me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So I have to respond in kind... and show them results befitting the
daughter of two meisters.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Meisters—it's a system Germany has for certifying artisans. My father
worked hard to earn the title of meister and achieved his dream of
opening a cake shop.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My mother was once a racer like me, but she's since retired and, after
earning the same qualification, started helping my father.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
One worked steadily over years and years to open his own bakery as
planned. The other raced her time on the track, then immediately
moved on to starting a second life.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have nothing but respect for my parents, and just like them, I want
to follow my own proper path in life.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But what exactly is that path? When I asked myself this question, I
thought of my mother's racing career.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is no greater pride for an Umamusume than racing... So I
decided that I, too, would run.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I decided I would train duly day after day and place as planned in
every race. Then, eventually, I would win a G1, and stand as proud as
any racer could hope to.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, having achieved all my goals... I would be a daughter
worthy of my parents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that's the real reason she cares about her schedules so much. She
just wants to make her parents proud, and she wants to do it her way.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Passing out was unplanned, but nothing more needs correcting
beyond this point.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even if it were my own mistakes which led to this... I can't afford to
turn back now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to improve. No trainer would call that a mistake. But she
also needs to be flexible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not that there's much I can do at this point. After hearing her story, I
wouldn't dream of stopping her from racing. All I can say is...
choice_data_list: Your feelings will get through to your parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...My feelings, you say.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, you said they'd be proud of my hard work, and now this—you
talk only in vague emotions. I guess our minds operate on different
wavelengths.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've forgotten to thank you. You were the one who carried me
here, were you not?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I... have been curious. Why do you insist on looking out for me?
choice_data_list: Well, I can't just let you overwork yourself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry?
choice_data_list: You're so serious and yet so... clueless.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Me? Clueless?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've never been told that before... But considering how far I've come, I
don't think I'm clueless.
choice_data_list:
Well, sometimes you just need a change of
perspective.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Flash! You're finally back! Jeez, do you have any idea how
worried I was?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Are you ignoring me? Hello? Flaaash?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon, do I strike you as... clueless?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...How so?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you tend to get tunnel vision, and then it's like your head
doesn't have room for anything else.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Like right now, for instance. You were probably too busy thinking
about how you need to get back to your dorm or whatever, so you
still haven't noticed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Noticed what?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The nice slippers from the nurse's office you've got on. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, you really had no idea! Hey, you know what would be nice?
Someone to point these things out to you. ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe so.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anywho, as long as you're all right, I'm happy. Get some sleep, and
good luck tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: All right.
